action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "Now I need to create a Makefile that will build all three executables: serial, openmp, and mpi. I need to ensure the Makefile includes the correct compilation flags for each implementation.",
  "plan": "I'll create a Makefile that defines rules for building each of the three executables with their respective compilation flags. The Makefile will include targets for serial (no special flags), openmp (with -fopenmp), and mpi (with mpicc).",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > Makefile << 'EOF'
# Makefile for particle simulator

# Compiler settings
CC = gcc
MPICC = mpicc
CFLAGS = -std=c99 -O3 -Wall -Wextra
OMPFLAGS = -fopenmp
MPIFLAGS = 

# Source files
COMMON_SRC = common.c
SERIAL_SRC = serial.c
OPENMP_SRC = openmp.c
MPI_SRC = mpi.c

# Header files
HEADERS = particle.h

# Executables
EXECUTABLES = serial openmp mpi

# Default target
all: $(EXECUTABLES)

# Serial executable
serial: $(SERIAL_SRC) $(COMMON_SRC) $(HEADERS)
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -o $@ $^ -lm

# OpenMP executable
openmp: $(OPENMP_SRC) $(COMMON_SRC) $(HEADERS)
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) $(OMPFLAGS) -o $@ $^ -lm

# MPI executable
mpi: $(MPI_SRC) $(COMMON_SRC) $(HEADERS)
	$(MPICC) $(CFLAGS) $(MPIFLAGS) -o $@ $^ -lm

# Clean target
clean:
	rm -f $(EXECUTABLES)

.PHONY: all clean
EOF
",
      "duration": 1.0
    }
  ]
}
